Intraday post (15/Oct)

Explaining my Window of Risk call:

Window of Risk, Disbalance - Investigating the story that the market tells

Weekly post, october OpEx:

OpEx week, China risk - Weekly post (13 - 17/Oct)

VIX climbed up towards 20-21s during yesterday’s session. From know the fragility I described in the weekly post is on.

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

The speed profile draws us a fly pattern today centering around 6670, with net positive speed profile.But the whole profile is very flat, so there is a huge uncertainity in regards of direction. Implied distribution says like 4.64% more probability for downside against upside. But it is not a significant difference.

As the speed profile is flat, the asymmetry is lower, the centroid is close to the center of the fly, at 6672.93,there is no upside or downside vacuum effect here, they are balanced. The area is sticky. But not too much… very loose stickiness.

Upside pivot is at 6692.60, this is where the upside shorter gamma kicks in, towards 6725From here 6700 is a local pin in the power hour.

Downside pivot is at 6645.83,where shorter downside gamma can accelerate the spot toward 6592.44and 6600 is pin.

Again, the distribution says that there is slightly more chance to retest the downside than to climb upward.However we have a local zero vanna at 6630/40, that makes it very hard for the spot to go down. So the odds favor for stickiness first, and upside second. 6630/40 area can give us a good opportunity for reversion, if touched, and if realized vol + put skew are sold.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
